changes: Addressed an issue wherein the barrier effect rate listed in the help text for the action 'Aspected Benefic' was incorrect (text only).

new_content.name: Alexander: Midas (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid content adjusted with the addition of the Echo, increasing players' maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency by 10%.

new_content.name: Alexander - The Cuff of the Son (Savage)
new_content.description: Adjustments made to encounter mechanics (Mind Blast and Drainage potency/range reduction).

new_content.name: Alexander - The Arm of the Son (Savage)
new_content.description: Adjustments made to encounter mechanics (Bomb explosions no longer interrupt spellcasting; High Wire duration reduced).

new_content.name: Alexander - The Burden of the Son (Savage)
new_content.description: Adjustments made to encounter mechanics (Mind Blast, Drainage, and Brute Justice Damage Up effect reduced).

new_content.name: Party Finder
new_content.description: System allowing recruitment of party members even if they do not meet the average item level requirement for a duty, provided the party meets the member requirement.

new_content.name: Wondrous Tails
new_content.description: Content system where an issue regarding missing seals was addressed.

new_content.name: The Palace of the Dead
new_content.description: Deep dungeon content where an issue regarding player targeting while affected by the palace cobra's 'Devour' was addressed.

new_content.name: Containment Bay P1T6
new_content.description: Trial content where an issue with the voice track was addressed.

new_content.name: Containment Bay P1T6 (Extreme)
new_content.description: Trial content where an issue with the voice track was addressed.

new_content.name: Alexander - The Eyes of the Creator (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid content where an issue with alarum behavior when attacked by pets or turrets was addressed.

housing.name: Witch's Broom
housing.description: A furnishing item that can be discarded.

housing.name: Pumpkin Butler
housing.description: A furnishing item that can be discarded.

glamour.name: Witch's Broom
glamour.description: Item that can now be discarded.

glamour.name: Pumpkin Butler
glamour.description: Item that can now be discarded.
